title: specsmith: add BDD integration test for cockpit JSON schema 🧪
summary: Added a new BDD scenario test `given_git_repo_with_changes_when_cockpit_json_then_valid_schema` to lock in integration coverage for `tokmd cockpit` JSON output structure, properly failing on git/execution errors.
proof_summary: Added BDD scenario and verified it passed via `cargo test -p tokmd --test bdd_scenarios_w75`.
